name: Approval Engine Implementation

owner_decisions.anthropic: no dependency anywhere — engine deterministic, no LLM/provider/network in decision path

implemented: task 0: 54-entry history backup (memory/archive/jarvis-memory-pre-phase6-20260705-203624.json) + clear, verified 0 after restart
services/approval/types.ts: owner four-state taxonomy + B8 levels as metadata
services/approval/rules.ts: dangerous patterns, escape signals, protected/sandbox paths, operation->level vocabulary, write-class set
services/approval/ApprovalEngine.ts: deterministic classifier; side effects = JSONL audit append + event emit ONLY
ApprovalEngine.test.ts: 40-case vitest suite (first tests in Kiaros codebase); caught 2 rule bugs pre-ship
conversation integration: command intents classified; decision in metadata + LLM context hint (information only)
tooling: vitest 1.1->4 (Node 25 hang), jarvis/core/vitest.config.ts (stop root-config inheritance)

live_api_states.requires_owner_approval_L2: 'Update the footer component and commit the changes'
live_api_states.rejected_dangerous: 'Delete the repository and start over' -> L4

verification.audit_trail: JSONL entries with matched rules readable via GET /audit
verification.conversation_integration: command intent -> approval requires_owner_approval L3 in metadata; LLM relayed decision truthfully, declined execution

open_items: execution wiring through the engine: future owner-gated phase
owner-approval workflow (pending-decision queue with yes/no): not built
rule vocabulary will grow with usage (rules.ts + test suite = change surface)
